title: Yuhdolan
description: Intoducing Yuhdolan - a travel and tourism information website that provides a variety of travel destinations and tourism information. It also provides a platform for users to share their travel experiences and reviews. This project is a personal project on my campus. I made to learn more about Laravel and Tailwind CSS. I also made this project to help people who want to travel to find information about tourist attractions and culinary in Indonesia.

title: Cazh Services
description: Intoducing Cazh Service - Cazh Service is an application to manage employee tasks. This application has features to manage tasks, services, roles, and users. This project is a internship project. I made to learn more about Laravel and Tailwind CSS. I also made this project to help people who want to manage their employee tasks.

title: Taman Gading Connect (Under remake)
description: Intoducing TG Connect - a monitoring and data collection system that provides a variety of data collection and monitoring information. It also provides a platform for users to share their reporting and information. This project is a final project on my campus. I made to learn more about React Native and Laravel REST API. I also made this project to help people who want to monitoring, sharing a report and information.
